1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get AR50 polygons and attributes for later spatial join (ogc_fid, wkb_geometry, arjordbr, areal)

3.description: reduce AR50 to Stavanger extent (AR50 ∩ kommune)

4.description: inspect distinct arjordbr codes in the reduced AR50 (count by arjordbr)

5.description: get teig parcels in Stavanger municipality (teigid, kommunenummer, omrade)

6.description: filter reduced AR50 polygons to agricultural arjordbr code(s) discovered in step 4

7.description: find teig parcels that intersect the agricultural AR50 polygons

8.description: collapse to one row per teigid (group by teigid)

9.description: sort teig rows by teigid ascending
